Sample.Title: CD28_CD3_control_ASAP_ATAC

Channel.Treatment-Protocol: Thawed cryopreserved PBMCs were resuspended to 1M/ml density in either complete medium supplemented with IL2 (unstimulated control) or complete medium supplemented with IL2 and ImmunoCult Human CD3/CD28 T cell Activator (stimulated sample) for 16 hours.
Channel.Extract-Protocol: Samples were stained with hashing and surface marker antibodies, fixed with 1% PFA and then extracted using the 10x protocol (Omni-ATAC) ATAC libraries were constructed according to the 10x Genomics scATAC-seq v1.1 protocol while ASAP antibody tags were captured via the bridge oligo spiked-in the barcoding reaction and amplfied using tag-specific handles.GEX libraries were constructed according to the 10x Genomics scRNAseq v3.1 protocol and CITE tags as described in CITE-seq protocols (Stoeckius et al, 2017). 10x Genomics scATAC-seq v1.1 (ASAP-seq) / scRNA-seq v3.1 (CITE-seq)

Sample.Data-Processing: Fastqs were generated using CellRanger-ATAC mkfastq v1.2.0 (ATAC) and CellRanger mkfastq v3 (RNA) respectively. Sequencing reads were aligned using CellRanger-ATAC and CellRanger count for the hg38 reference genome For ADT and HTO count libraries, tag abundances were quantified per barcode using the kallisto/kite framework. Genome_build: hg38 Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Per-barcode count abundance for the protein count data including the ATAC singlecell QC metrics; barcoded accessible chromatin fragments per ATAC library

Sample.Title: AvsB_ATAC_LLL

Channel.Treatment-Protocol: Thawed cryopreserved PBMCs were stained with either TSA TBNK panel only (Broad samples) or with 1:1 mix of TSA:TSB TBNK panel (AvsB samples) or with TSA extracellular TBNK followed by TSB intracellular staining, using the indicated lysis conditions.
Channel.Extract-Protocol: Samples were stained with hashing and surface marker antibodies, fixed with 1% PFA and then extracted using the mtscATAC-seq or Omni ATAC as indicated in different lysis conditions ATAC libraries were constructed according to the 10x Genomics scATAC-seq v1 protocol while antibody tags were captured via the bridge oligo spiked-in the barcoding reaction and amplfied using tag-specific handles.

Sample.Data-Processing: Fastqs were generated using CellRanger-ATAC mkfastq v1.2.0 Sequencing reads were aligned using CellRanger-ATAC count for the hg38 reference genome For ADT and HTO count libraries, tag abundances were quantified per barcode using the kallisto/kite framework. Genome_build: hg38 Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Per-barcode count abundance for the protein count data including the ATAC singlecell QC metrics; barcoded accessible chromatin fragments per ATAC library

Sample.Title: SpeciesMix1_ADT

Channel.Treatment-Protocol: HEK-293 and NIH-3T3 cells were stained with hCD29 and mCD29, washed, fixed and lysed using the OMNI lysis buffer
Channel.Extract-Protocol: Samples were stained with hashing and surface marker antibodies, fixed with 1% PFA and then extracted using the 10x Genomics OMNI protocol. ATAC libraries were constructed according to the 10x Genomics scATAC-seq v1 protocol. Antibody tags were captured via the bridge oligo spiked-in the barcoding reaction and amplfication using tag-specific handles was performed using as input fragments before or after SPRI purification as indicated.

Sample.Data-Processing: Fastqs were generated using CellRanger-ATAC mkfastq v1.2.0 Sequencing reads were aligned using CellRanger-ATAC count for the hg38-mm10 reference genome For ADT count libraries, tag abundances were quantified per barcode using the kallisto/kite framework. Genome_build: hg38 / mm10 Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Per-barcode count abundance for the protein count data including the ATAC singlecell QC metrics; barcoded accessible chromatin fragments per ATAC library

Antibody tags were captured via the bridge oligo spiked-in the barcoding reaction and amplfication using tag-specific handles was performed using as input fragments before or after SPRI purification as indicated.

Sample.Data-Processing: Fastqs were generated using CellRanger-ATAC mkfastq v1.2.0 Sequencing reads were aligned using CellRanger-ATAC count for the hg38-mm10 reference genome For ADT count libraries, tag abundances were quantified per barcode using the kallisto/kite framework. Genome_build: hg38 / mm10 Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Per-barcode count abundance for the protein count data including the ATAC singlecell QC metrics; barcoded accessible chromatin fragments per ATAC library

Sample.Title: SpeciesMix2_ATAC

Channel.Extract-Protocol: Samples were stained with hashing and surface marker antibodies, fixed with 1% PFA and then extracted using the 10x Genomics OMNI protocol. Sample.Title: Perturb_CD4_stim_AD1

Channel.Source: T-cells from peripheral blood mononuclear cells
Channel.Treatment-Protocol: Cells were re-stimulated for 72 hours and then enriched for live cells by cell sorting
Channel.Growth-Protocol: Cells were stimulated for 72 hours, followed by 4 days resting and then electroporation with Cas9 protein. Samples were treated with distinct gRNAs based on the overall design. Cells were further expanded an additional 7 days
Channel.Extract-Protocol: Samples were stained with hashing antibodies for multiplexing gRNAs and surface marker antibodies, fixed with 1% PFA and then extracted using the 10x protocol (Omni-ATAC) ATAC libraries were constructed according to the 10x Genomics scATAC-seq v1.1 protocol while antibody tags were captured via the bridge oligo spiked-in the barcoding reaction and amplfied using tag-specific handles.

Sample.Data-Processing: Fastqs were generated using CellRanger-ATAC mkfastq v1.2.0 Sequencing reads were aligned using CellRanger-ATAC count for the hg38 reference genome gRNA-based KOs were assigned based on a modified version of HTO Demux. For ADT and HTO count libraries, tag abundances were quantified per barcode using the kallisto/kite framework. Genome_build: hg38 Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Per-barcode count abundance for the protein count data including the ATAC singlecell QC metrics; barcoded accessible chromatin fragments per ATAC library

Sample.Title: Human_BoneMarrow_ATAC

Channel.Treatment-Protocol: Thawed cryopreserved bone marrow cells were stained with 6 TSA hashing antibodies and the BM antibody panel (242 antibodies), washed, fixed and lysed using the LLL lysis buffer
Channel.Extract-Protocol: Samples were stained with hashing and surface marker antibodies, fixed with 1% PFA and then extracted using the mtscATAC-seq ATAC libraries were constructed according to the 10x Genomics scATAC-seq v1 protocol while antibody tags were captured via the bridge oligo spiked-in the barcoding reaction and amplfied using tag-specific handles.

Sample.Data-Processing: Fastqs were generated using CellRanger-ATAC mkfastq v1.2.0 Sequencing reads were aligned using CellRanger-ATAC count for the hg38 reference genome We further provide fragment counts for an hg19 alignment for community use. For ADT and HTO count libraries, tag abundances were quantified per barcode using the kallisto/kite framework. Genome_build: hg38 / hg19 Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Per-barcode count abundance for the protein count data including the ATAC singlecell QC metrics; barcoded accessible chromatin fragments per ATAC library

Sample.Title: CD28_CD3_LLL_control_Multiome_ATAC

Channel.Treatment-Protocol: Thawed cryopreserved PBMCs were resuspended to 1M/ml density in either complete medium supplemented with IL2 (unstimulated control) or complete medium supplemented with IL2 and ImmunoCult Human CD3/CD28 T cell Activator (stimulated sample) for 16 hours.
Channel.Extract-Protocol: Control and stimulated PBMCs were stained with a TotalSeqA antibody panel (210 antibodies), sorted to remove dead cells and granulocytes, and permeabilised with two methods: 1) 0.1% PFA fixation followed by permeabilization with LLL buffer and 2) permeabilization with 0.1% digitonin . Cells were subsequently subjected to transposition and loaded into the 10x Multiome chip for the barcoding reaction. ATAC and GEX libraries were constructed according to the 10x Genomics single cell Multiome protocol. Protein tags were captured via the polyT barcoded oligos and amplfied using tag-specific handles. 10x Genomics Multiome + CITE-seq antibody capture

Sample.Data-Processing: Fastqs were generated using CellRanger-ARC mkfastq v1.0.0 Sequencing reads were aligned using CellRanger-ARC for the hg38 reference genome For ADT count libraries, tag abundances were quantified per barcode using the kallisto/kite framework. Genome_build: hg38 Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Per-barcode count abundance for the protein count data including the singlecell QC metrics, barcoded accessible chromatin fragments per ATAC library, gene expression counts, and mRNA counts

Channel.Treatment-Protocol: Cells were re-stimulated for 72 hours and then enriched for live cells by cell sorting
Channel.Growth-Protocol: Cells were stimulated for 72 hours, followed by 4 days resting and then electroporation with Cas9 protein. Samples were treated with distinct gRNAs based on the overall design. Cells were further expanded an additional 7 days
Channel.Extract-Protocol: Samples were stained with hashing antibodies for multiplexing gRNAs and surface marker antibodies, fixed with 1% PFA and then extracted using the 10x protocol (Omni-ATAC) ATAC libraries were constructed according to the 10x Genomics scATAC-seq v1.1 protocol while antibody tags were captured via the bridge oligo spiked-in the barcoding reaction and amplfied using tag-specific handles. 10x Genomics scATAC-seq v1.1

Sample.Data-Processing: Library strategy: CITE-Seq Fastqs were generated using CellRanger-ATAC mkfastq v1.2.0 Sequencing reads were aligned using CellRanger-ATAC count for the hg38 reference genome The two sequencing lanes (C6 and D6) were combined using CellRanger-ATAC aggr For ADT and HTO count libraries, tag abundances were quantified per barcode using the kallisto/kite framework. gRNA-based KOs were assigned based on a modified version of HTO Demux. Genome_build: hg38 Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Per-barcode count abundance for the protein count data including the ATAC singlecell QC metrics; barcoded accessible chromatin fragments per ATAC library
